reviewer_objection: The paper has no positive downstream or translation result.
evidence_response: Step26 explicitly frames the contribution as a controlled diagnostic negative result; Steps15/16/24/25 block positive claims.
manuscript_action: Make the negative result the title and abstract thesis.

reviewer_objection: The result may be caused by test leakage or branch search.
evidence_response: Step09/10 invalidate v1 translation shortcuts; Step12 creates v2 split; Steps13-26 no-final audits have bad=0.
manuscript_action: Lead with v2 protocol and no-final audit.

reviewer_objection: Raw MLM losses across tokenizers may be unfair.
evidence_response: Step16 and Step24/25 use estimated word/char-normalized MLM ratios, all failing the <=1.100000 gate.
manuscript_action: Report raw loss only with normalized metrics.

reviewer_objection: The 8k branch may solve the issue.
evidence_response: Step23 passes as a redesign probe, but Step24 word/char ratio=1.472019 and Step25 ratio=1.587381 fail.

reviewer_objection: The failure may be only bad initialization.
evidence_response: Step14 compares random, mean, fvt, align, focus zero-step; Step21 tests mean and align under full MLM budget and both fail.
manuscript_action: Include initialization table and avoid claiming all possible init methods are exhausted.

reviewer_objection: The repair attempts are too shallow.
evidence_response: Steps18-20 test weighting, new-row-only, and staged/lower-rate updates; none pass seed-stable gates.
manuscript_action: Call these intuitive probes, not exhaustive repair search.

evidence_response: Step26/27 limitation requires Bible-domain wording; external-domain check is P1 future work.
manuscript_action: Do not claim broad domain generalization.

reviewer_objection: Translation results are confusing because Step07 had a branch pass.
evidence_response: Step09 method-matched audit fails and Step10 invalidates test-aware/mixed-method branch evidence.
manuscript_action: Move Step07 branch to exploratory appendix only.

reviewer_objection: Language identification could inflate downstream interpretation.
evidence_response: Step08/26 guardrails exclude language ID as positive downstream evidence.
manuscript_action: State language ID is diagnostic only.

reviewer_objection: The paper needs a path to future positive claims.
evidence_response: Step26 and Step27 list P0 objective/data redesign plus Step15/16-style gates before ACT readout.
manuscript_action: Include a short future-work gate paragraph.

reviewer_objection: If appended-token prediction is diagnosed, the paper should propose a remedy.
evidence_response: Step28 proposes subtoken-teacher distillation plus curriculum added-token MLM with base KL/replay preservation, with explicit Step15/16-style pass gates.
manuscript_action: Add solution roadmap slide and future-work paragraph; keep it clearly labelled proposed-not-tested.
